title: Tempus Announces Strategic Collaboration Agreement with Merck to Accelerate AI-Driven Precision Medicine
raw_text: Tempus AI, Inc. (NASDAQ: TEM), a leader in AI-driven precision medicine, today announced a strategic collaboration with Merck to accelerate the use of real-world data and genomic profiling in oncology drug development.
rationale: Major pharma partnership; primary subject; material catalyst.
